name: Gary Giddins
abstract: Gary Giddins (born 1948) is an American jazz critic and author. He wrote for The Village Voice from 1973; his "Weather Bird" column ended in 2003.

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: My good friend Gary Giddins, who we will get to when we come to the Down Beat era
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Tate
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee addresses 'Gary' multiple times (e.g., 'We must have made it, Gary, in 25 minutes', 'You know who sounds like him? Paul Desmond... I'll tell you who sounds more like him, Gary'), indicating familiarity with the interviewer, but no specific professional or personal relationship histor

about_quotes.speaker: Scott Yanow
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee (Scott Yanow) does not mention Gary Giddins; the mention is made by the Interviewer, and the Interviewee responds to the Interviewer's question about Giddins without indicating a personal relationship.
about_quotes.doc_title: Scott Yanow interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 22, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Rufus Reid
about_quotes.evidence: And then you turn around and you read the typical “jazz is dead” article or — Gary Giddins said something about how can you promote this music when it’s not on radio or TV etcetera.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rufus Reid interviewed by Monk Rowe, Atlanta, GA, January 4, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: Larry Ridley
about_quotes.evidence: Case in point there’s a thing in the new Jazz Times where Gary Giddins is talking about Kenny G. And I must check with Gary to find out if this is really true
about_quotes.doc_title: Larry Ridley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 10, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Mancuso
about_quotes.evidence: I brought them all in. 1978. And then I did 1979, we did another thing and I brought other critics in. ... Gary Giddins. Ira Gitler. Don DeMichael.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Mancuso interviewed by Monk Rowe, Buffalo, New York, October 10, 2013
